requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence and Environmental Derating for Greece PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全证据及希腊光伏逆变器环境降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 安全證據及希臘光伏逆變器環境降額

summary.en: For Greek solar PV projects, inverter safety documentation should be prepared around IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 type-test evidence for the exact inverter model or family, and demonstrated as part of CE marking under the EU Low Voltage Directive 2014/35/EU. ELOT is the national standards body, RAAEY oversees the energy sector, and IPTO/HEDNO control the practical grid-connection interface, so project submissions should include accredited IEC safety reports, installation manuals, ratings, nameplate data, protection-device coordination, earthing instructions, and environmental limits. Greece has a hot, high-irradiance Mediterranean climate with significant island exposure, so safety files should also address enclosure ingress protection, terminal temperature rise, ventilation, and derating for high ambient temperatures, humidity, and coastal/island marine exposure.
summary.zh: 对于希腊太阳能光伏项目，逆变器安全文件应围绕准确型号或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式试验证据准备，并作为依据欧盟低电压指令2014/35/EU取得CE标志的一部分予以证明。ELOT是国家标准机构，RAAEY监管能源行业，IPTO/HEDNO控制实际并网接口，因此项目提交文件应包括认可的IEC安全报告、安装手册、额定值、铭牌数据、保护装置配合、接地说明和环境限值。希腊是高辐照、炎热的地中海气候并存在大量岛屿暴露，安全文件还应说明外壳防护等级、端子温升、通风以及针对高环境温度、高湿和沿海/岛屿海洋暴露的降额。
summary.zht: 對於希臘太陽能光伏項目，逆變器安全文件應圍繞準確型號或系列的IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據準備，並作為依據歐盟低電壓指令2014/35/EU取得CE標誌的一部分予以證明。ELOT是國家標準機構，RAAEY監管能源行業，IPTO/HEDNO控制實際併網介面，因此項目提交文件應包括認可的IEC安全報告、安裝手冊、額定值、銘牌資料、保護裝置配合、接地說明和環境限值。希臘是高輻照、炎熱的地中海氣候並存在大量島嶼暴露，安全文件還應說明外殼防護等級、端子溫升、通風以及針對高環境溫度、高濕和沿海/島嶼海洋暴露的降額。

standards_or_laws: Directive 2014/35/EU (Low Voltage Directive) — mandatory for CE marking in Greece/EU
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
ELOT standards adoption and conformity expectations where applicable
RAAEY and IPTO/HEDNO project documentation requirements for grid-connected solar PV equipment
Project environmental requirements for high ambient temperature, humidity, coastal/island salt-mist, ingress protection, and thermal derating

summary.en: China safety documentation for PV grid-connected inverters commonly uses GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic CQC or CGC voluntary certification, and CNAS-accredited laboratory reports. These documents are useful for supplier qualification but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 evidence or EU LVD CE-marking evidence for Greek projects. Chinese safety reports may also be based on China-rated configurations, labels, manuals, surge protection, and 220/380 V assumptions, while Greek project files must reflect 230/400 V, 50 Hz installation conditions and Mediterranean/island environmental exposure.
summary.zh: 中国光伏并网逆变器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内CQC或CGC自愿认证及CNAS认可实验室报告。这些文件有助于供应商资质评估，但不能自动作为希腊项目的IEC 62109-1/-2证据或欧盟LVD CE标志证据。中国安全报告还可能基于中国额定配置、标签、手册、浪涌保护和220/380 V假设，而希腊项目文件必须反映230/400 V、50 Hz安装条件和地中海/岛屿环境暴露。
summary.zht: 中國光伏併網逆變器安全文件通常使用GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內CQC或CGC自願認證及CNAS認可實驗室報告。這些文件有助於供應商資質評估，但不能自動作為希臘項目的IEC 62109-1/-2證據或歐盟LVD CE標誌證據。中國安全報告還可能基於中國額定配置、標籤、手冊、浪湧保護和220/380 V假設，而希臘項目文件必須反映230/400 V、50 Hz安裝條件和地中海/島嶼環境暴露。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
CQC / CGC voluntary certification programmes for China domestic PV inverter safety and performance

gap.en: Gap: A China-only GB/T 37408 or NB/T 32004 safety file does not automatically satisfy Greek IEC safety expectations or EU LVD CE-marking requirements. Exporters should provide IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports for the supplied model or model family, demonstrate LVD conformity for CE marking, confirm that labels and manuals match the Greek configuration, document protection coordination and earthing, and add environmental evidence for high ambient temperature, salt-mist corrosion, ingress protection, humidity, ventilation, and thermal derating. Any changes to enclosure, terminals, firmware settings, surge protection, or nameplate ratings for Greece can require updated safety documentation.
gap.zh: 差距：仅中国GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自动满足希腊IEC安全要求或欧盟LVD CE标志要求。出口商应提供所供应型号或型号系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，为CE标志证明LVD符合性，确认标签和手册匹配希腊配置，记录保护配合和接地，并补充高环境温度、盐雾腐蚀、外壳防护、湿度、通风和热降额环境证据。针对希腊对外壳、端子、固件设置、浪涌保护或铭牌额定值的任何变更，均可能需要更新安全文件。
gap.zht: 差距：僅中國GB/T 37408或NB/T 32004安全文件不能自動滿足希臘IEC安全要求或歐盟LVD CE標誌要求。出口商應提供所供應型號或型號系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，為CE標誌證明LVD符合性，確認標籤和手冊匹配希臘配置，記錄保護配合和接地，並補充高環境溫度、鹽霧腐蝕、外殼防護、濕度、通風和熱降額環境證據。針對希臘對外殼、端子、韌體設置、浪湧保護或銘牌額定值的任何變更，均可能需要更新安全文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — CE marking under LVD 2014/35/EU is required for Greece/EU market access; IEC 62109 safety evidence is effectively required where ELOT, RAAEY, IPTO/HEDNO, EPC, lender, insurer, or project-owner documentation calls for it
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T, NB/T, CQC, or CGC safety evidence applies to China domestic or voluntary certification contexts and is not automatically transferable to Greece

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not rely on China GB/T or NB/T inverter safety files alone for Greek PV projects. Prepare IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence for the exact model, demonstrate LVD conformity for CE marking, align labels and manuals to Greece's 230/400 V 50 Hz configuration, and document high-ambient-temperature, humidity, ingress-protection, corrosion, and thermal-derating controls. Confirm current ELOT, RAAEY, IPTO/HEDNO, and project-owner safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 希腊光伏项目不应仅依赖中国GB/T或NB/T逆变器安全文件。请为准确型号准备IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据，为CE标志证明LVD符合性，使标签和手册匹配希腊230/400 V、50 Hz配置，并记录高环境温度、湿度、防护等级、腐蚀和热降额控制。出货前请确认现行ELOT、RAAEY、IPTO/HEDNO及项目业主安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 希臘光伏項目不應僅依賴中國GB/T或NB/T逆變器安全文件。請為準確型號準備IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據，為CE標誌證明LVD符合性，使標籤和手冊匹配希臘230/400 V、50 Hz配置，並記錄高環境溫度、濕度、防護等級、腐蝕和熱降額控制。出貨前請確認現行ELOT、RAAEY、IPTO/HEDNO及項目業主安全要求。
